revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-1-080

The limiting values of some parameter describing an item which should not be exceeded under specified conditions and between which, if it is operating as specified, it will give stated performance.
